message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
' version: 1.20230706
' Skins: https://plantuml.com/skin-parameters
' UML Class Diagram: https://plantuml.com/class-diagram

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam monochrome true

title Class Diagram - SP02 CLASS DIAGRAM

package "controllers" {
}

class Application <<C>>
class RelationService <<C>>
class CategoryService <<C>>
class FamilyService <<C>>
class AccountService <<C>>
class TransactionService <<C>>
class Family <<C>>
class Relation <<C>>
class FamilyMember <<C>>
class AccountData <<C>>
class MoneyValue <<C>>

interface Category <<I>>
interface Account <<I>>
interface Transaction <<I>>

package "category" {
}

package "accounts" {
}

Application --> controllers : 
Application --> RelationService : has
Application --> CategoryService : has list
Application --> FamilyService : has list
Application --> AccountService : has
Application --> TransactionService : has
RelationService --> Category : implements
RelationService --> Family : handles
RelationService --> Relation : handles
CategoryService --> Family : has list
FamilyService --> Family : has
FamilyService --> FamilyMember : has list
AccountService --> AccountData : implements
TransactionService --> Transaction : handles
Family --> FamilyMember : has list
FamilyMember --> Account : has list
AccountData --> Account : contains
AccountData --> Transaction : contains
AccountData --> MoneyValue : contains
Transaction --> MoneyValue : contains
Account --> Transaction : contains
Account --> Transaction : has list
@enduml
```
